content_body: We are from Virginia traveling to see gold and gem mines from NC at Lucky Strike to Florida and then Blue Ridge, GA. It was exciting to see the smal Lucky Strike gem buckets here! We had a wonderful trout dinner at the Toccoa Riverside Restaurant. They had outside dining! It is absolutely breathtaking here. Loved the hot tub! Outside sitting areas are relaxing and perfect for reading. Thank you!
title: Perfect Stop on our Road Trip
